glossary.reserve bank of australia: banco de la reserva de australia
glossary.Reserve Bank of New Zealand: banco de la reserva de nueva zelanda

RBA: banco de la reserva de australia

flaggedForReview.flag: Alternatives: pmi de producción industrial (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pmi industrial" → "industrial PMI" (expected "manufacturing PMI") | DOMAIN: "manufacturing PMI" → "pmi industrial": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "PMI manufacturero")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "dólar" → "dollar" (expected "greenback") | DOMAIN: "greenback" → "dólar": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "billete verde")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "sesgo expansionista" → "expansionary bias" (expected "easing bias")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pmi de servicios" → "services PMI" (expected "service-sector PMI")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "equivalentes del g10" → "G10 equivalents" (expected "G10 counterparts") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "equivalentes del g10" → "G10 equivalents" (expected "G10 counterparts") | DOMAIN: "G10 counterparts" → "equivalentes del g10": WRONG: "homólogos del G10" | DOMAIN: "G10 peers" → "equivalentes del g10": WRONG: "homólogos del G10"

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nfp" → "NFP" (expected "nonfarm payrolls") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nfp" → "NFP" (expected "nonfarm payrolls") | DOMAIN: "nonfarm payrolls" → "nfp": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "nóminas no agrícolas")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "retroceso" → "retracement" (expected "pullback") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "retroceso" → "drawdown" (expected "pullback") | DOMAIN: "retracement level" → "retroceso": ACCEPTABLE (more precise: "nivel de retroceso")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "interanual" → "year-over-year" (expected "yoy")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "gráfico de cuatro horas" → "four-hour chart" (expected "4-hour chart")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pb" → "P/B" (expected "basis points") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pb" → "P/B" (expected "basis points")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "perspectiva a corto plazo" → "short-term outlook" (expected "short-term picture") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "perspectiva a corto plazo" → "short-term perspective" (expected "short-term picture")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "cpm" → "CPM" (expected "MPC") | DOMAIN: "MPC" → "cpm": WRONG: "MPC" (Monetary Policy Committee — acronym kept in English in Spanish financial press)
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "intertrimestral" → "quarter-over-quarter" (expected "qoq")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "solicitudes de subsidio de desempleo" → "unemployment claims" (expected "initial jobless claims") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "solicitudes de subsidio de desempleo" → "unemployment claims" (expected "initial jobless claims")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "índice de costes laborales" → "labor cost index" (expected "employment cost index")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "irrupción por encima" → "breakout above" (expected "break above") | DOMAIN: "break above" → "irrupción por encima": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "ruptura al alza")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "presidente de la fed" → "Fed Chair" (expected "Fed President")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "mercado inmobiliario" → "real estate market" (expected "housing market")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "precio del dinero" → "cost of money" (expected "cash rate") | DOMAIN: "cash rate" → "precio del dinero": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "tipo de interés oficial")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "escalada" → "escalation" (expected "rally") | DOMAIN: "rally" → "escalada": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "rally" or "repunte")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "stocks" → "stocks" (expected "inventories") | DOMAIN: "inventories" → "stocks": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "inventarios" or "existencias")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "ipc de referencia" → "core CPI" (expected "headline CPI rate") | DOMAIN: "headline CPI rate" → "ipc de referencia": WRONG: "IPC general" or "IPC headline"

flaggedForReview.es: análisis de impulso a corto plazo
flaggedForReview.flag: BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "análisis de impulso a corto plazo" → "short-term momentum analysis" (expected "short-term momentum studies")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "bajistas" → "bearish" (expected "bears")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "suelo por fallo de oscilación" → "swing failure low" (expected "failure swing bottom pattern")
Alternatives: estudios de impulso (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "análisis de impulso" → "momentum analysis" (expected "momentum studies")
Alternatives: reunión de dos días (1x) | DOMAIN: "policy meeting" → "reunión de políticas": WRONG: "reunión de política monetaria"
Alternatives: peticiones de subsidio de desempleo (1x)

Alternatives: no pudiera hacer frente a su pago (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "quiebra" → "bankruptcy" (expected "default") | DOMAIN: "default" → "quiebra": WRONG: "impago" or "incumplimiento de pago"
Alternatives: repuntará (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "repunte" → "bounce" (expected "rebound")

Alternatives: programa de expansión monetaria (2x), plan de expansión (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "programa de expansión" → "expansion program" (expected "QE program") | DOMAIN: "QE program" → "programa de expansión": WRONG: "programa de expansión cuantitativa" or "programa de QE"

Alternatives: informe de inflación (1x), informe sobre inflación (1x) | DOMAIN: "inflation report" → "informe trimestral de inflación": WRONG: "informe de inflación" (adding "trimestral" is an unwarranted assumption)
Alternatives: alcista (4x) | DOMAIN: "bullish" → "alcistas": ACCEPTABLE (as adjective: "alcista")

Alternatives: devaluación de las garantías (2x), devaluación de garantías (1x), recorte (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "devaluación" → "devaluation" (expected "haircut") | DOMAIN: "haircut" → "devaluación": WRONG: "quita" (standard Spanish financial term for debt haircut)

Alternatives: tipos de los bonos de la fed (1x), interés de los fondos federales (1x), fondos federales (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "tipos de los fondos federales" → "federal funds rate" (expected "Fed funds rate")

Alternatives: fondos de rescate (ela) (2x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "fondos de rescate" → "bailout funds" (expected "Emergency Liquidity Assistance") | DOMAIN: "Emergency Liquidity Assistance" → "fondos de rescate": WRONG: "asistencia de liquidez de emergencia" or "ELA"
Alternatives: precios del crudo (1x), precio del petróleo (1x)
Alternatives: nivel de soporte (1x), línea de soporte (1x)
Alternatives: doble suelo (2x)
Alternatives: índice industrial de ism (1x) | DOMAIN: "ism manufacturing index" → "índice industrial ism": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "índice manufacturero ISM")
Alternatives: nfp (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nóminas no agrícolas" → "non-farm payrolls" (expected "nonfarm payroll")
Alternatives: política de tipos (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "tipo oficial" → "official rate" (expected "policy rate")
Alternatives: fondos (1x)

Alternatives: baje los tipos (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "baja los tipos" → "lower rates" (expected "cut rates") | DOMAIN: "cut rates" → "baja los tipos": ACCEPTABLE (more standard: "recortar los tipos")
Alternatives: curvas de rentabilidad (1x) | DOMAIN: "yield curves" → "curvas de beneficios": WRONG: "curvas de rendimiento" or "curvas de tipos"

flaggedForReview.es: precios de la mena de hierro
flaggedForReview.flag: Alternatives: precio de la mena de hierro (1x) | DOMAIN: "iron ore prices" → "precios de la mena de hierro": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "precios del mineral de hierro")

Alternatives: precio del barril de brent (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "barril de brent" → "barrel of Brent" (expected "Brent crude oil") | DOMAIN: "Brent crude oil" → "barril de brent": WRONG: "petróleo crudo Brent" (adding "barril" is unwarranted)
Alternatives: mercado de bonos (1x) | DOMAIN: "bond market" → "mercado de obligaciones": ACCEPTABLE (more common: "mercado de bonos")
Alternatives: controles al capital (1x) | DOMAIN: "capital controls" → "controles para el capital": WRONG: "controles de capital"
Alternatives: salarios reales (1x)
Alternatives: medida de la inflación (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "indicador de inflación" → "inflation indicator" (expected "inflation measure")
Alternatives: ofertas (1x)

Alternatives: tasa de abandono (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "tasa silenciosa" → "silent rate" (expected "quit rate") | DOMAIN: "quit rate" → "tasa silenciosa": WRONG: "tasa de renuncias" or "tasa de abandono voluntario"
Alternatives: media móvil exponencial (1x) | DOMAIN: "exponential moving average" → "media exponencial": ACCEPTABLE (more complete: "media móvil exponencial")
Alternatives: rentabilidad del bono (1x)
Alternatives: divisas de los mercados emergentes (1x) | DOMAIN: "EM currencies" → "divisas": WRONG: "divisas de mercados emergentes"
Alternatives: bonos del tesoro (1x) | DOMAIN: "Treasuries" → "tesorerías": WRONG: "bonos del Tesoro estadounidense" or "Treasuries"
Alternatives: expectativa sobre la inflación (1x)

flaggedForReview.es: miembro del consejo ejecutivo del bce
flaggedForReview.flag: Alternatives: miembro del comité ejecutivo del bce (1x)
Alternatives: movimiento de los tipos de interés (1x)

Alternatives: rentabilidad de los bunds (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "bunds" → "bunds" (expected "Bund yields") | DOMAIN: "Bund yields" → "bunds": WRONG: "rentabilidad de los bunds" or "rendimiento de los bunds"
Alternatives: subir los tipos (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "política restrictiva" → "restrictive policy" (expected "tightening")
Alternatives: anticipo (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "anticipará" → "will anticipate" (expected "frontload") | DOMAIN: "frontload" → "anticipará": ACCEPTABLE (more standard: "adelantará")

Alternatives: índice de principales indicadores de conference board (1x) | DOMAIN: "Conference Board leading index" → "principal índice del conference board": WRONG: "índice adelantado del Conference Board"

flaggedForReview.flag: Alternatives: línea de tendencia ascendente a más largo plazo (1x)
